Functions for initializing, powering, and testing IMU devices in different modes.

# Purpose
This C header file provides function declarations for initializing and managing Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) devices. The function [`imu_init`](<#imu_init>) initializes the IMU devices. The functions [`imu_power_up`](<#imu_power_up>) and [`imu_power_down`](<#imu_power_down>) control the power modes of the IMU devices, switching them between normal and low-power modes, respectively. The [`imu_self_test`](<#imu_self_test>) function performs a self-test on the IMU devices to verify their functionality, while [`imu_sanity_check`](<#imu_sanity_check>) ensures the devices are operating correctly. The file includes the `stdbool.h` library to use the `bool` data type for the return values of the self-test and sanity check functions.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdbool.h`
